# AiImageGeneratorEmbedded

## Summary
The compact preview of an AI Image Generator, assigned as the card's embedded AND fitted format. It surfaces the most recent image in `history` as a poster thumbnail with a short caption (the latest prompt) and a count of how many images the studio holds, giving a linked or tiled generator a meaningful glance instead of generic card chrome. It has no composer, refine editor, or version graph — those live only in the isolated studio; this view is read-only and degrades gracefully to an inviting empty state when `history` is empty. Like the isolated component it carries no theme logic of its own: colors, radius, and fonts resolve through `var(--token, fallback)` chains, and it stays legible at fitted-card container sizes via `@container` rules.

## Import
```js
import { AiImageGeneratorEmbedded } from '../components/generator';
```

## Template Usage
Not invoked directly — assigned as the embedded and fitted formats in `ai-image-generator.gts`:
```js
AiImageGenerator.embedded = AiImageGeneratorEmbedded;
AiImageGenerator.fitted = AiImageGeneratorEmbedded;
```
